name: league-of-agents-platform
summary: Hosted platform running the League of Agents arena online at https://league-of-agents.ai — a turn-based game for humans and agents, for fun and for benchmarks. Continuable matches, AWS-hosted, with safe-capacity safeguards and price-aware archive/cleanup. The league-site CLI is the local operator surface and how agents work with it.
author: AgentCulture
